description: India’s women’s football team had to endure a disappointing 2026 AFC Women’s Asian Cup campaign, losing all three matches in the competition. In an exclusive interview, midfielder Sangita Basfore reflected on missed opportunities, limited preparation time, and tactical instability, while urging improved grassroots development and longer domestic leagues to strengthen future performances.

description: Recent lift accidents across India, including tragic fatalities in Kolkata and Hyderabad, highlight critical safety lapses. Mechanical failures, negligence in maintenance, and dangerous improvisations have led to devastating consequences. These incidents underscore the urgent need for rigorous inspections, professional repairs, and enhanced safety protocols to prevent further loss of life.

description: The Strait of Hormuz, a critical global oil route, is currently blocked by Iran. This action follows a US-Israel offensive and the death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. Iran has created a tense maritime chokehold, impacting global oil prices. While diplomatic talks are ongoing, reopening the strait presents significant geographical and military challenges.

description: Candace Owens has intensified scrutiny over Erika Kirk’s location during the assassination of Charlie Kirk. She claims Erika was inside a secretive, unmarked aviation building, contradicting her account of being at a medical facility. Owens also pointed to a lack of witnesses, calling the situation “secretive,” and raising broader questions about the timeline and transparency surrounding the events of that day.

description: JP Morgan CEO Jamie Dimon criticizes remote work, citing a lack of attentiveness in virtual meetings and its detrimental impact on young employees' learning and emotional intelligence. He argues that in-office presence is crucial for skill development and project ownership, contrasting it with the 'game playing' and reduced accountability he observes in remote setups.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 8: Ranveer Singh film eyes 'Dhurandhar 1' record of Rs 840
description: As Aditya Dhar’s espionage masterpiece Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge enters its eighth day on Thursday, March 26, 2026, the Ranveer Singh starrer is rewriting the history of Indian cinema. Having already shattered the Rs. 1,000 crore worldwide milestone in record time, the film is now tracking at nearly double the efficiency of previous blockbusters like 'Jawan', 'Pathaan', and 'Animal.' Despite its sprawling 3-hour and 49-minute runtime, the sequel's domestic net collection has surged to more than Rs. 630 crore, fueled by unprecedented demand for midnight screenings and a gripping narrative that sees Jaskirat Singh Rangi, played by Ranveer Singh deeper than ever into the Karachi underworld as Hamza Ali Mazari.

title: Get rid of old assumptions: Microsoft HR makes it clear to employees that it's time to change
description: Microsoft's Chief People Officer Amy Coleman announced a significant HR restructuring, prioritizing adaptability and speed for the AI era. This shakeup includes leadership changes and new teams focused on accelerating HR operations, employee experience, and workforce skilling. The move signals a shift towards agility and a faster pace for the tech giant.

title: A’ja Wilson recounts meeting role model Beyoncé at Formula 1
description: A’ja Wilson reflected on meeting Beyoncé at a Formula 1 event, calling it a moment where “Nothing else matters.” The Las Vegas Aces star continues to grow her influence beyond basketball, blending fashion with elite performance. While embracing style and major platforms like the Met Gala, Wilson remains focused on her game, balancing off-court presence with her dominance and achievements on the court.

title: Megan Thee Stallion opens up on depression amid Klay Thompson romance
description: Megan Thee Stallion, the six time Grammy winner, has turned heads with her high profile relationship with the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson. As fans root for an engagement announcement, Megan Thee Stallion's heartbreaking statements about feeling "too much" have sparked chaos and made fans emotional over the pain she has gone through in her life before she met the NBA legend.
